'''Jamie Alcroft''' is an American comedian and voice actor who voiced [[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]], [[All Terrain Personal Transport|AT-PT]] drivers, and [[Javelin (vehicle)|Javelin]] submarine captains in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and voiced [[Shai]], [[Jalta]], [[Gavon Kroan]], as well as additional voices for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]], [[All Terrain Personal Transport|AT-PT]] drivers, [[Javelin (vehicle)|Javelin]] submarine captains
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' – [[Shai]], [[Jalta]], [[Gavon Kroan]], additional voices
